zh.lifeSummary: 當Oda von der Lausitz-Ostmark於大約1015年受洗時，她的父親Thietmar II. Markgraf der Nieder-Lausitz24歲，母親Rainhilda VON BEICHLINGEN21歲。她與Wilhelm III. von Weimar結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1067年在德國布藍登波格藍德可萊斯 艾爾-爾斯特巴德 利本維爾達勞希次享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Oda von der Lausitz-Ostmark于大约1015年受洗时，她的父亲Thietmar II. Markgraf der Nieder-Lausitz24岁，母亲Rainhilda VON BEICHLINGEN21岁。她与Wilhelm III. von Weimar结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1067年在德国布藍登波格藍德可萊斯 艾爾-爾斯特巴德 利本維爾達勞希次享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Zoltan, Istvan, Janos, Lajos.
Hungarian (Dér): from the old personal name Dér of Turkic origin, or a nickname for a gray-haired man, from the vocabulary word dér ‘hoarfrost’.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 謝, see   Xie   1.

variants.name: Xie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Hong, Li, Ming, Ying, Min, Qing, Yuan, Bin, Hui, Ping, Wei, Xiaoli, Ding, Chang, Lan, Quan, Cong, Dang, Hai, Tian, Yiping.

Mandarin form of the surname 謝, meaning ‘thank’ in Chinese: (i) from Xie (謝), the name of an ancient state (possibly located in Nanyang in Henan province), annexed around the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ).Later this place was probably granted to Shen Bo (the Earl of Shen), uncle of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). After it was annexed during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), the name of the state was adopted as a surname. (ii) adopted in place of the surname Zhi-Le (直勒) by Xie Xiaozheng (謝孝政), an official during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Oda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Oda von der Lausitz-Ostmark was christened about 1015, her father, Thietmar II. Markgraf der Nieder-Lausitz, was 24 and her mother, Rainhilda VON BEICHLINGEN, was 21. She married Wilhelm III. von Weimar. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1067, in Lausitz, Bad Liebenwerda, Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Germany, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Oda von der Lausitz-Ostmark a été baptisée environ 1015, son père, Thietmar II. Markgraf der Nieder-Lausitz, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Rainhilda VON BEICHLINGEN, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Wilhelm III. von Weimar. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1067, à Lausitz, Bad Liebenwerda, Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Oda von der Lausitz-Ostmark um 1015 getauft wurde, war ihr Vater Thietmar II. Markgraf der Nieder-Lausitz 24 und ihre Mutter Rainhilda VON BEICHLINGEN 21. Sie hat Wilhelm III. von Weimar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1067 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Lausitz, Bad Liebenwerda, Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Oda von der Lausitz-Ostmark è stato battezzato circa 1015, sua padre, Thietmar II. Markgraf der Nieder-Lausitz, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Rainhilda VON BEICHLINGEN, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Wilhelm III. von Weimar. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1067, nel Lausitz, Bad Liebenwerda, Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Germania, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Oda von der Lausitz-Ostmarkが約1015年に洗礼を受けた時，父Thietmar II. Markgraf der Nieder-Lausitzは24歳，母Rainhilda VON BEICHLINGENは21歳であった。Wilhelm III. von Weimarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1067年にドイツブランデンブルグランドクレイス エルベ-エルスターバド リーベンウエルダラウシッツで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Oda von der Lausitz-Ostmark(이)가 대략 1015년에 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thietmar II. Markgraf der Nieder-Lausitz(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rainhilda VON BEICHLINGEN(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Wilhelm III. von Weimar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1067년 독일 브랜덴버그 랜드크레이스 엘브-스터 바드 리벤워다 로짓즈에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Oda von der Lausitz-Ostmark foi batizada aproximadamente 1015, seu pai, Thietmar II. Markgraf der Nieder-Lausitz, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Rainhilda VON BEICHLINGEN, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Wilhelm III. von Weimar. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1067, em Lausitz, Bad Liebenwerda, Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Alemanha, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Oda von der Lausitz-Ostmark была крещена около 1015 г., её отцу по имени Thietmar II. Markgraf der Nieder-Lausitz было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Rainhilda VON BEICHLINGEN, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wilhelm III. von Weimar. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1067 г. в местности лаусиц, бад лиебенвирда, ландкрис элбе-елстир, брэнденбург, Германия в возрасте 53 лет.

Markgraf der Nieder-Lausitz, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Rainhilda VON BEICHLINGEN, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Wilhelm III. von Weimar. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1067, en Lausitz, Bad Liebenwerda, Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Alemania, a la edad de 53 años.
